name: migrapilot-vscode
description: MigraPilot — an AI engineering chat assistant for the MigraTeck ecosystem, with live editor context.

enumDescriptions: Simple local Ollama engine (:3399) — read-only tools, in-memory.
Full engine (:3377) — multi-provider model routing, missions, cryptographic approvals, durable state.
migrapilot.backend.description: Which MigraPilot backend the chat talks to. Default is the canonical pilot-api (full engine). 'pilot-web' is an explicit temporary fallback only.

migrapilot.pilotApiUrl.description: Base URL of the full pilot-api backend (used when migrapilot.backend = pilot-api).

migrapilot.apiUrl.description: Base URL of the pilot-web backend (used when migrapilot.backend = pilot-web). Also serves the voice recorder page.

migrapilot.apiToken.description: Optional bearer token for the pilot-api backend.

migrapilot.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama base URL used to list selectable models.

migrapilot.visionModel.description: Local Ollama vision model used to analyze attached images/screenshots (e.g. llava:latest, llama3.2-vision:11b).

migrapilot.workspace.enabled.description: Let MigraPilot read and act on THIS workspace. Without it, pilot-api's repo/git tools run against the server's filesystem, where your files do not exist — so the assistant cannot actually see your code. Reads are automatic; writes always show a diff first; shell commands follow the auto-run list below.

migrapilot.workspace.autoRunCommands.description: Run known build/test/lint commands (npm test, tsc --noEmit, eslint, read-only git) without asking, so MigraPilot can run your tests, read the failure and fix it. Anything not on that list — and anything that chains, redirects or substitutes commands — always asks. Turn this off to be prompted for every command.
